节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The context of form edit extension. It allows access to formEditExtension-specific resources.
注释信息: @extends UIExtensionContext
@syscap SystemCapability.Ability.Form
@stagemodelonly
@since 18
@param { Want } want - Including second extension ability name.
@returns { Promise<AbilityResult> } Returns the result of start second form editor extension ability.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - The application is not a system application.
@throws { BusinessError } 16500050 - An IPC connection error happened.
@throws { BusinessError } 16500100 - Failed to obtain the configuration information.
@throws { BusinessError } 16501000 - An internal functional error occurred.
@syscap SystemCapability.Ability.Form
@stagemodelonly
@since 18
